response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A; the video contains only instrumental background music with no vocal performances. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used to identify slide transition boundaries; manual transcription and translation were performed for prominent on-screen Japanese messages and concert announcement cards in accordance with the Visual Events rule. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely synchronized with slide transitions, utilizing instantaneous transitions (where the end time of one block equals the start time of the next) to maintain continuous coverage of the visual content.

subtitles.original: Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina'nis 1st Concert 'Drawn to Dawn' を応援しています！
subtitles.english: Supporting Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina'nis 1st Concert "Drawn to Dawn"!

subtitles.original: 二人のライブが素晴らしいものになりますように！！
subtitles.english: May your concert together be a wonderful one!!

subtitles.original: 初のライブ開催おめでとうございます！
二人の活動を後ろから応援出来て幸せです！！
subtitles.english: I'm happy to be able to support you from behind!!

subtitles.original: いつまでも応援し続けます！
たくさん練習してきた事、皆に魅せてきてね！
subtitles.english: Show everyone everything you've practiced so hard for!

subtitles.original: 二人とも、ずっと応援してるよ！
最高のライブになりますように！！
The concert will be starting soon.
subtitles.english: [Announcement] The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original: 二人のライブが最高に楽しいものになりますように！
subtitles.english: Hope your concert is the most fun ever!
